articles.title: Moment quakes hit Venezuela, causing people to rush on to streets
articles.description: Video filmed by BBC reporters, contributors and locals shows the aftermath, as frantic residents evacuate.

articles.title: Scotland fans face anxious World Cup wait after bruising Brazil defeat
articles.description: Steve Clarke's side lost 3-0 to Brazil in Miami but a third place finish Group C means they could still make the last 32 of the World Cup.

articles.title: 'Typical Scotland': Tartan Army give their verdict on Miami match against Brazil
articles.description: Scotland's hopes of reaching the knockout stages of the World Cup are in peril after Brazil won 3-0 in Miami.

articles.title: UK sees hottest June day on record as 36.1C recorded in Hampshire
articles.description: Heat records were broken when temperatures soared across southern England on Wednesday afternoon.
